hero.title: Say Goodbye to Manual SKILL.md
hero.subtitle: From local files to remote servers, from single edits to batch validation — configure all your Skills visually, without writing a single line of YAML.

items.desc: Form-based editing + live preview + Diff comparison — zero config errors
Local / ClawHub / GitHub / SSH — four sources, one workspace
Cross-file validation + edit-time checks + batch verification

pillarDetails.desc: One indentation mistake in handwritten YAML can break an entire Skill. SkillForge replaces manual editing with structured forms, generates SKILL.md in real-time, and lets you review line-level Diff before saving.

features.name: Form-Based Editor
features.detail: Dropdowns, toggles, tag inputs — no more handwriting YAML

features.name: Live Markdown Preview
features.detail: Every change reflects instantly in SKILL.md, what you see is what you get

features.name: Line-Level Diff
features.detail: One click to review all changes before saving, with line-by-line highlighting

features.name: Region-Level Tracking
features.detail: See exactly which areas changed and how many modifications were made

pillarDetails.desc: No more SSH + vim + test cycles. SkillForge connects directly to remote servers for editing with automatic SFTP write-back. Import Skills from ClawHub and GitHub with one click.

features.name: SSH Remote Read/Write
features.detail: Edit Skills on your server directly, auto write-back via SFTP with reconnect

features.name: ClawHub Import
features.detail: Search community Skills on ClawHub, download to local workspace in one click

features.name: GitHub URL Import
features.detail: Paste a GitHub repo URL, auto-parse directory structure and download

pillarDetails.desc: Updated sources.json but forgot to sync topics.json? Found out only after deployment? SkillForge catches cross-file issues during editing, and batch validation checks all Skills at once.

features.name: 5 Cross-File Rules
features.detail: Auto-detect missing references, empty paths, unused variables and more

features.name: Edit-Time Validation
features.detail: URL format, required fields checked in real-time, blocks save on error

features.name: Batch Validation
features.detail: One-click to validate all Skills, summary table with error/warning/info counts

features.name: Batch Export
features.detail: Serialize all Skills to JSON manifest for one-click download

download.title: Download SkillForge
download.subtitle: Native Tauri app, installer under 10MB
download.releases: All versions and installers available on GitHub Releases

finalCta.title: Start Using SkillForge
finalCta.subtitle: Free, open source, available on 3 platforms

footer.tagline: Visual Configuration Tool for OpenClaw Skills
